summary: Iteration 22: Hardening fixes testing complete. Fixed critical bug in audit log where auth endpoints showed 'anonymous' instead of user email. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/check-email captures user email in audit log
POST /api/auth/login captures user email in audit log
GET /api/audit-log shows user emails (not all anonymous)
Frontend mobile (390x844): How It Works page - no horizontal overflow, text wraps properly
Frontend mobile (390x844): How It Works page - badges wrap correctly (Stocks: 3,400+)
Frontend mobile (390x844): Market Cockpit - briefing card visible
Frontend mobile (390x844): BatchScanner page - '3400+ NSE + BSE stocks' text visible
Frontend desktop: How It Works page - 'Stocks: 3,400+' badge visible
Frontend desktop: BatchScanner page - '3400+ NSE + BSE stocks' text visible
Frontend desktop: Audit Log page accessible with 115 entries showing user emails

bugs_fixed.issue: Audit log showed 'anonymous' for auth endpoints (/api/auth/check-email, /api/auth/login) instead of user email
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Request body was being read AFTER call_next() consumed it. In FastAPI/Starlette, once the body is consumed by the route handler, it cannot be read again in middleware.
bugs_fixed.fix: Cache the request body BEFORE calling call_next() for auth endpoints. The email is now extracted from the cached body and used in the audit log entry.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified the hardening fixes: (1) Audit log now correctly captures user email from request body for auth endpoints - fixed by caching body BEFORE call_next(). (2) God Mode scanner text updated to '3400+ NSE + BSE stocks' on BatchScanner page. (3) How It Works page is mobile responsive with no horizontal overflow. (4) Market Cockpit briefing card visible on mobile. (5) All 6 portfolios returned by /api/portfolios. (6) Guidance vectors ready with 25,401 vectors.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Audit log showing 'anonymous' for auth endpoints
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In FastAPI/Starlette middleware, the request body can only be read once. The code was attempting to read the body AFTER call_next(request) had already consumed it, resulting in an empty body and no email extraction.
reproduction_steps: 2. Check audit log - entry shows 'anonymous' instead of 'test@example.com'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Cache the request body BEFORE calling call_next() for auth endpoints. The cached email is then used when building the audit log entry.
